ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "invoice_number" INTEGER /* Invoice number assigned by the system */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the invoice was created */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the sale was made */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sale */,
  "monetary_value" REAL /* Total monetary value of the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the invoice was created in the system */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale was made */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash, debit) */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the invoice */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in an invoice */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice to which the item belongs */,
  "stock_code" INTEGER /* Stock code of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the item (quantity * unit price) */,
  "returnable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is returnable */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period for the item */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "stock_code" INTEGER /* Unique stock code for each product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the product belongs */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger inventory replenishment */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase made by the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "lifetime_value" REAL /* Lifetime value of the customer */,
  "last_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction (e.g., purchase, return, support call) */,
  "preferred_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred store */,
  "communication_preference" TEXT /* Customer's communication preference (e.g., email, SMS, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Currency symbol used in the country */,
  "dial_code" TEXT /* Dialing code for the country */,
  "is_eu_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the country is a member of the European Union */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales associate, inventory manager, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the account was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "module_accessed" TEXT /* Module or feature accessed by the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser and device) used by the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns_and_refunds" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return or refund */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice associated with the return or refund */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the return or refund */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return or refund */,
  "return_method" TEXT /* Method of return (e.g., in-store, mail) */,
  "refund_method" TEXT /* Method of refund (e.g., credit card, store credit) */,
  "is_processed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the return or refund has been processed */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date the return or refund was processed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the return or refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_and_refunds_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES invoice_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_and_refunds_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)
